name: A J's School Buses LLC
districts_or_customers: Likely Worcester County Public Schools (Pocomoke area routes)
recent_news: FMCSA/DOT record exists for ALICE JEAN ENNIS (DOT 3494806), consistent with a very small single-operator school bus contractor based in Pocomoke City, MD. No M&A or growth news found.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-bus owner-operator on Maryland's Eastern Shore; too small for a standalone Summit tuck-in. Could only be relevant as part of a roll-up of multiple Worcester County contractors.

name: Propps School Buses LLC
principals: Dale Propps (associated contractor per NMPED list)
districts_or_customers: Fort Sumner Municipal Schools (De Baca County, NM)
recent_news: Appears on NM Public Education Department School Bus Contractor List (April 2020) as a Fort Sumner-area contractor (Dale Propps, 575-760-3886). No M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: Rural single-operator family contractor in eastern NM serving one small district. Not a viable Summit tuck-in on its own; only relevant as part of a NM owner-operator consolidation.

name: Bus Boys LLC
districts_or_customers: Sumner County Schools operates its own fleet (~220 buses) so any contracting role would be marginal; possibly contract/charter work
recent_news: No corporate, news, or contractor-list confirmation found. Sumner County Schools runs an owned fleet via its Transportation Department in Gallatin, which limits the contractor market.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm this is an active school-bus contractor; Sumner County is a district-owned-fleet market. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate without further validation.

name: Cochran Bus Co Inc
principals: Beverly Ann Cochran (listed Owner; deceased Sept 15, 2022)
districts_or_customers: Harford County Public Schools (Forest Hill / Bel Air area)
recent_news: Listed owner Beverly Ann Cochran of Forest Hill, MD passed away September 15, 2022 (per McComas Family Funeral Homes obituary). Company still listed in directories but ownership/operating status post-2022 is unclear.
fit_notes: Classic micro succession situation: long-time named owner deceased in 2022, very small fleet in Harford County MD (a Summit/Mid-Atlantic-relevant geography). Too small as a standalone tuck-in but a candidate route-package acquisition if any Harford County contractors are being rolled up.

name: Gilbert School Bus Co
districts_or_customers: Cecil County Public Schools (listed on CCPS FY23 contractor list)
recent_news: Active contractor on Cecil County Public Schools bus contractor roster. Manta/Yellow Pages show revenue est. $1-2.5M and 20-49 employees, materially larger than the 4-employee tier suggested by the source record. No M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: Decent-sized family-owned Cecil County MD contractor (Rising Sun/North East area) with ~$1-2.5M revenue and 20-49 employees - more attractive Summit Mid-Atlantic tuck-in profile than the other names here. Long-tenured Joe/Edwina Gilbert ownership suggests a plausible succession story; worth a direct call.
